scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/sim-server test && node --test scripts/run-sim-dev.test.mjs scripts/visual-scene-anchor-regression.test.mjs && corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/sim-server exec node --import tsx --test ../../scripts/web-sim-fallback.test.ts && node scripts/visual-game-smoke.mjs
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/sim-server lint && corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/many-lives-web lint
scripts.format: corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/sim-server format && corepack pnpm --filter @many-lives/many-lives-web format
